title: Divyanshu — Full Stack Developer & Open-Source Builder
about:
Computer Science student passionate about building modern web applications and digital experiences.

Skilled in JavaScript, React, PHP, Laravel, and MySQL, with a strong interest in full-stack development and AI integration.

I enjoy solving real-world problems through code and continuously learning new technologies to improve my development skills.

projects.title: Smart Trip Planner
projects.subtitle: AI-powered travel planning & automation
projects.description:
AI-powered travel planning application that generates personalized trip itineraries based on user preferences.

Features include weather integration, smart recommendations, and Google Calendar scheduling for automated trip planning.

projects.title: Disaster Portal
projects.subtitle: Community incident management framework
projects.description:
A full-stack web platform that allows users to report disaster incidents in real time with location tracking and media uploads.

Designed to improve access to emergency information and support community response during critical situations.

certificates.title: Privacy and Security in Online Social Media by NPTEL
certificates.description: Gained knowledge of privacy risks, data protection, and security practices in online social media platforms.

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry)
